chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-280 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 08-09-2025 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Through instant petition the petitioners seek protection as they apprehend danger to their lives at the hands of private respondents. The respondents Inspector Abdul Ghafoor SHO police station Taluka and SSP Larkana have submitted their replies wherein they have stated that they will provide protection to the petitioners as and when required. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied by the statement filed by the official respondents and seeks disposal of the petition in wake of the said statements. Order accordingly. The Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
